name: Lemon Blossom Cookies
recipeIngredient: Assorted fruit preserves; or Pecan halves
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease cookie sheets.
2. Cream butter and confectioner's sugar together until smooth.
3. Add lemon juice and beat well to combine.
4. Gradually add flour, mixing thoroughly. Chill the dough for 2 hours.
5. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
6. Shape the chilled dough into 1 1/4 inch balls.
7. Roll each ball in chopped nuts.
8. Place the balls one inch apart on the prepared cookie sheets.
9. Press your thumb into the center of each ball and fill with fruit preserves or pecan halves.
10. Bake for 14-16 minutes, or until lightly browned.
